public_reputation: Known around Cosmoria through day-to-day work as scribe.
manner: Listens for contradictions, omissions, and names that do not quite align, then files them where they can matter later. In Cosmoria, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of scribe in and around Cosmoria, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Cosmoria workable through the obligations of scribe while managing the immediate pressure of storm weather, trade vulnerability.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of scribe credible while absorbing the strain created by storm weather, trade vulnerability.

adventure_hooks.summary: Brine Tideglass can draw the party into a locality problem centered on scribe duties in Cosmoria.
Brine Tideglass becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with storm weather, trade vulnerability around Cosmoria.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Brine Tideglass is immediately readable as a scribe tied to Cosmoria.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Cosmoria: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Brine Tideglass presents as someone shaped by the duties of a scribe and the daily pressures of Cosmoria.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a scribe, and proof that strangers will not make Cosmoria harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Brine Tideglass refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a scribe too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can notice inconsistencies, formalize statements, and preserve proof that others hoped would blur.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Brine Tideglass adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Brine Tideglass always knows more about Cosmoria than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a scribe in Cosmoria.
